channel.title: What Is Being Built — Daily Activity Feed
channel.description: Daily updates on open-source automated research tools: commits, releases, and community activity.

item.title: Daily digest — 2026-07-17
item.description:
Our open-source research community has been bustling with activity across multiple projects. Notably, the `statcheck` and `escicheck` projects have seen updates, with `statcheck` focusing on administrative updates and `escicheck` synchronizing with the `escicheckapp` repository to bring its `main` branch up to date with the latest `effectcheck` version. Meanwhile, `oddpub` has released version 7.3.0, featuring updated documentation, a new Zenodo badge, and a refreshed README file. Other projects, such as `docpluck`, `coarse`, `regcheck`, and `output-it-forward`, have also made significant progress, addressing issues, fixing bugs, and adding new features. These connections and advancements demonstrate the collaborative spirit and dedication of our community, and we celebrate the progress being made across these projects.

34 commits across 3 active repositories this week.

New releases: oddpub v7.3.0

Dormant repos revived: statcheck

Most active:

regcheck22 commits
oddpub9 commits
metacheck3 commits

item.title: statcheck: activity update
item.description:
MicheleNuijten/statcheck

The `feature-non-apa-newer` branch was worked on, where a merge was performed, specifically merging the `feature-non-apa-newer` branch from the `https://github.com/MicheleNuijten/statcheck` repository into itself. The `feature-non-apa-newer` branch also received "admin updates", as per the commit message, which suggests changes to administrative aspects of the repository. No other branches were mentioned in the provided commits, indicating that all recent work was focused on `feature-non-apa-newer`. The merge commit combined changes from the remote `feature-non-apa-newer` branch into the local version, but the specifics of these changes are not detailed in the provided commit messages. The nature and extent of the "admin updates" are also not elaborated upon in the commit messages.

⚠ This repository was dormant and has recently become active again.

View all commits →

item.title: oddpub: 6 commits today
item.description:
quest-bih/oddpub

The `main` branch was the focus of the recent work, with multiple commits made to it. The Zenodo badge was updated, as indicated by the commit message "ontogenerator: Updated Zenodo badge", and also referenced in another commit as "ontogenerator: zenodo badge". The README file underwent a "touchup", according to the commit message "ontogenerator: README touchup", and the version number was incremented to 7.3.0 with the commit "ontogenerator: Increment version number to 7.3.0". Additionally, the documentation was updated and keywords were cleaned up, as stated in the commit "ontogenerator: Documentation update, keyword cleanup".

6 commit(s) today:

  • e1ca58e [main] Updated Zenodo badge — ontogenerator
  • 441d354 [main] README touchup — ontogenerator
  • 998a877 [main] Increment version number to 7.3.0 — ontogenerator
  • 95643d5 [main] zenodo badge — ontogenerator
  • 7c98de1 [main] Documentation update, keyword cleanup — ontogenerator

New release: v7.3.0 — Toba

View all commits →
